name: Robert Loh Kobla
title: Founder & CEO
shortBio: Robert started Robayer WealthLab after watching people around him avoid investing — not from disinterest, but because no one had ever explained it in plain language. He set out to be the person he wished he'd had earlier: someone slightly ahead on the journey, happy to explain the confusing parts without judgment.
longBio: Robert started Robayer WealthLab after watching too many smart, hardworking people in his own circle stay away from investing — not because they didn't want to build something, but because no one had ever explained it to them in plain language. Treasury bills, MoMo savings, the Ghana Stock Exchange — all of it felt like it belonged to people with more money, more connections, or more schooling than they had.

He didn't set out to build a financial institution. He set out to be the person he wished he'd had early on: someone slightly ahead on the journey, willing to explain the confusing parts without making anyone feel behind.

That's still the whole model. No hype, no guaranteed returns, no jargon for the sake of sounding smart — just honest, practical guidance for wherever you're starting from, delivered one guide, one article, and one better decision at a time.
quotes: Wherever you're starting from, we'll meet you there.
